chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR Const. Pett. No.D-1727 of 2024 DATE OF HEARING ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE Hearing of case 1. For orders on office objections at flag ‘A’ 2. For hearing of main case 17.09.2025 Mr. Ihsan Ali Lund Balouch, Advocate for petitioner Mr. Zulfiqar Ali Naich, Assistant Advocate General ************** Mr. Ziaul-Haque Kamboh, Advocate, has filed Vakalatnama on behalf of respondent No.5, same is taken on record. He has also filed a statement on behalf of respondent No.5, same is also taken on record. From perusal of the statement, it appears that the entire differential amount in respect of the petitioner’s pension has been paid and no amount remains outstanding. While affirming these facts, learned counsel for the petitioner does not press the present Constitution Petition. Accordingly, the same is dismissed as not pressed. J U D G E J U D G E M. Ali*
